((booking_id IS NULL) OR (booking_id IN ( SELECT bookings.id
   FROM bookings
  WHERE (bookings.business_id = ANY (current_business_ids())))) OR (slot_id IN ( SELECT slots.id
   FROM slots
  WHERE (slots.business_id = ANY (current_business_ids())))))
